title: Creamy Fritters Italian Yacon Crumble
description: A rich and creamy Italian dish featuring powdered sugar, fried fritters made with a fibrous vegetable called yacon for an energizing meal that is also fodmap-friendly.
instructions: Blend Yacon in a high-speed blender until smooth, then slowly add powdered sugar and mix well. Stop the machine when it reaches a creamy consistency, about 2-3 minutes.
Gently fold in egg whites (if using fresh eggs).
In a large bowl, combine flour and vanilla extract; gently fold in yacón mixture.
Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. When hot, drop spoonfuls of the dough into the pan and press slightly to form shapes.
Fry until golden brown on both sides, about 3-5 minutes per side. Use tongs for handling them gently.
Remove from heat, place on a wire rack lined with parchment paper to drain excess oil.
Once cooled down enough, serve with powdered sugar dusted over it.
